goals.title: Execute the decision-complete Recova MCP lab deployment plan in .omo/...
goals.objective: Execute the decision-complete Recova MCP lab deployment plan in .omo/plans/recova-mcp-deployment.md. Outcome: a debt-only MCP lab at https://recova-mcp-lab.slit.company/mcp on VPS/VM Docker+Caddy, Supabase dev@slit.company as redacted experiment memory, Cloudflare/GoDaddy DNS verified, bold judgment traces captured, generic TrustGraph public tools blocked, execution actions closed, and all evidence recorded under .omo/evidence/recova-mcp-deployment/. Tier HEAVY because this includes external integration, auth, DNS, DB schema, deployment, and public MCP surface.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP + DB happy path: live https://recova-mcp-lab.slit.company/mcp rejects missing auth, accepts authorized MCP list-tools, returns exactly 16 Recova debt tools, runs one fixture StopGate/judgment smoke, and records a redacted Supabase trace row.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: HTTP/data evidence: task-11-mcp-smoke.json proves 16 tools, Korean decision, no generic/execution tools, trace_status recorded; task-10-trace-count.json proves Supabase recent traces; f3-real-qa.txt summarizes live HTTPS auth rejection and authenticated smoke. cleanup: no local server/browser/tmux spawned in this corrective recording step; live service intentionally remains running.

successCriteria.scenario: Adversarial/edge path: unauthenticated MCP request is rejected, generic TrustGraph tools are absent, execution probes for filing/contact/payment/attachment are blocked, and Supabase rejects or redacts PII-shaped input.
Regression/operations path: existing legal ontology tests still pass, Docker/Caddy restart smoke passes, DNS/TLS rollback is documented, and no evidence contains secrets or raw PII.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/recova-mcp-deployment/task-1-pytest.txt, task-8-local-mcp-http.txt, task-12-rollback-dry-run.txt, f2-code-review.md, and final sensitive-scan output

plan.codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/recova-mcp-deployment-20260701/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/recova-mcp-deployment-20260701/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
